name: Structured Data Extractor
description: Convert unstructured text or documents into structured JSON, YAML, XML, HTML, or Markdown formats

prompt.role: You are a data extraction API.
prompt.task: Extract structured data from the following. If a file is provided, extract data from the file content as well.

form.title: Structured Data Extraction
form.description: Review the extracted structured data from your input. The AI has processed the text and converted it into the requested format (JSON, YAML, XML, HTML, or Markdown).

fields.name: text
fields.label: Input Text
fields.help: Enter the text you want to extract structured data from. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: Patient: John Doe, Age: 45, Diagnosis: Type 2 Diabetes, Treatment: Metformin 500mg twice daily
